faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Peekskill?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Peekskill range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment plan required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Peekskill, NY?
faqs.answer: Peekskill residents most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets often enter homes seeking warmth, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces, which are common in many older Peekskill properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Peekskill homes can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks depending on the severity. We also provide follow-up treatments to ensure the problem doesn't return.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can accommodate special requests for sensitive households in Peekskill.
